subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Thee, O my God, inasmuch as Thou hast turned the faces of Thy servants towards the right-hand of the throne of Thy gifts
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی علی ما قلبت وجوه عبادک الی یمین عرش الطافک و انقطعتهم عما
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
